gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found custom connector packages, mixed-case metadata, and pre-probe validation gaps; all were patched, covered by regression tests, and final re-review found no actionable issues.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_engine_adapters.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review completed; findings resolved and re-review clean
what_changed: Hardened serving backend boundaries to accept only vLLM and SGLang connectors
Normalized backend and payload-mode strings at adapter dataclass and record boundaries
Rejected mismatched connector package metadata before native probe side effects
why: The package must integrate with established serving engines rather than custom solvers; handoff and probe artifacts should not be able to describe a custom connector under a vLLM or SGLang backend.
